# swipeRight(withVelocity:)

**Instance Method**

Sends a swipe-right gesture with a velocity you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor @nonobjc @preconcurrency func swipeRight(withVelocity velocity: XCUIGestureVelocity)
```

## Parameters

- **velocity**: The speed at which to perform the swipe-right gesture, expressed in pixels per second.

## Deprecated methods

- **swipeDown(withVelocity:)**: Sends a swipe-down gesture with a velocity you specify.
- **swipeUp(withVelocity:)**: Sends a swipe-up gesture with a velocity you specify.
- **swipeLeft(withVelocity:)**: Sends a swipe-left gesture with a velocity you specify.
